song.title: Holy, Holy, Holy
song.lyrics: [V] .D F#m Bm D7 G D 1Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God Almighty! 2Holy, Holy, Holy! All the saints a_dore Thee; 3Holy, Holy, Holy! Though the darkness hide Thee .F#m Bm E7 A7 1Unto everlasting days our song shall rise to Thee; 2Heaven’s elders cast their crowns down by the glassy sea; 3Though the eye of sinful man Thy glory may not see. .D F#m Bm D7 G D 1Holy, Holy, Holy, Merciful and Mighty! 2Cheru_bim and seraphim worship too before Thee, 3Only Thou art holy, there is none beside Thee .Bm F#m G A D 1God in Three Persons, blessed Trinity! 2Who wert, and art, and evermore shalt be. 3Perfect in power, in love, and purity.
